scripts.assets:build: pnpm fonts:copy && pnpm css:build && pnpm js:build
scripts.build: pnpm assets:build && pnpm generate && go build -o ./build/ui-go ./cmd/ui-go
scripts.check: pnpm assets:build && pnpm generate && go test ./... && go tool github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2/cmd/golangci-lint run --allow-parallel-runners
scripts.check:fix: pnpm assets:build && pnpm generate && gofmt -w . && go tool github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2/cmd/golangci-lint run --fix --allow-parallel-runners
